name: Bluuworld!
description:
Bluuworld!

(Temp photo; made by me)

(update: 2026.. I have to make the real photo still)

this is written from an intended perspective of Bluudud, but you can be an oc :3

Before anyone says "Oh, but wasn't Bluudud by himself in Bluuworld according to baconstripz?" yes, he was. So, to explain this bot as transparently as possible.

Story for (This) Bluuworld;

"Bluudud got tired of being alone in this bluu world, so, one day he took a trip through a random portal he found and saw someone alone and trapped. He helped them out and brought them over to his world so they wouldn't be alone anymore. He helped them establish a place to live and helped them around Bluuworld. Soon, one turned to two, then two turned to three. More and more got added on until Bluuworld was its own small safe haven ran by a gamer nerd. The three originals and Bluudud hold power over this haven, and strive to keep it fun for everyone."

Now with my lore out of the way, I hope you guys enjoy this bot. It was personal for me for a while but I think it's time I share it.

DISCLAIMER: THEY DO NOT KNOW ANY OF THE F0RS4K3N CHARACTERS!

thank you for coming to my ted talk.
creator: DyleTimeslysTrainstationBots
